title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PwC India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PwC India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, PwC India Global Group in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PwC India Global Group:
PwC India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India Global Group!
